ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Operating Temperature) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the parameter (e.g., T) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter (e.g., thermal, electrical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., Ta=25°C) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the condition */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the condition (e.g., ℃) */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard or regulation the condition adheres to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition the value belongs to */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter under the specified condition */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance value for the parameter */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for measuring the value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Engineer, QA) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification (e.g., ISO 9001) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the certification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_certifications" (
  "component_certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component-certification association */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_certifications_certification_id FOREIGN KEY ("certification_id") REFERENCES certifications ("certification_id")
)
column_names: Name of the parameter (e.g., Operating Temperature)
Category of the parameter (e.g., thermal, electrical)
ID of the parameter the condition belongs to
Standard or regulation the condition adheres to
ID of the condition the value belongs to
Value of the parameter under the specified condition
Method used for measuring the value
Name of the role (e.g., Engineer, QA)
Unique identifier for each user-role association
Unique identifier for each component-certification association
